Class AgePreferenceStrategy

java.lang.Object
shelter.strategy.AbstractMatchingStrategy
shelter.strategy.AbstractRangeMatchingStrategy
shelter.strategy.AgePreferenceStrategy
All Implemented Interfaces:
IMatchingStrategy
public class AgePreferenceStrategy extends AbstractRangeMatchingStrategy
A concrete matching strategy that evaluates whether an animal's age fits the adopter's preferred age range. The age is measured from Animal.getBirthday() so the strategy can use finer-grained age differences than whole years.

  • Constructor Details

    • AgePreferenceStrategy

      public AgePreferenceStrategy()
      Constructs a new AgePreferenceStrategy instance. This strategy is stateless and requires no initialization parameters.

  • Method Details

    • getCriterion

      public MatchingCriterion getCriterion()
      Returns the matching criterion handled by this strategy.
      Returns:
      MatchingCriterion.AGE

    • isApplicable

      public boolean isApplicable(Adopter adopter, Animal animal)
      Returns whether the adopter has expressed an age preference. The age criterion is considered applicable when at least one of minAge or maxAge is non-null; a null value for both means the adopter has no age preference.
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter being evaluated
      animal - the animal being evaluated
      Returns:
      true if the age criterion should be counted; false otherwise
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if adopter or animal is null

    • getDistanceFromPreferredRange

      protected double getDistanceFromPreferredRange(Adopter adopter, Animal animal)
      Returns how far the animal's age is from the adopter's preferred age range. A null bound is treated as unbounded (0 for min, Integer.MAX_VALUE for max). A value inside the range returns 0.0.
      Specified by:
      getDistanceFromPreferredRange in class AbstractRangeMatchingStrategy
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter being evaluated
      animal - the animal being evaluated
      Returns:
      the distance from the preferred age range
